Title: Estimation of SMPS' Conducted Emission According to CISPR Standards
Organization: MDPI Applied Sciences (Malczyk, Bara, Lu - Rockwell Automation)
Type: Peer-reviewed journal article PDF (open access, CC-BY)
Topics: SMPS conducted emission, CISPR 16-2-1, 3D parasitic extraction (Q3D/HFSS), LISN model, cable-harness S-parameters, transformer leakage/magnetizing inductance, time-domain estimation workflow
Notes: Appl. Sci. 2022, 12, 1458. doi:10.3390/app12031458. Defines a CISPR-16-2-1-compliant conducted-emission estimation workflow: 3D-extracted layout parasitics + LISN + cable harness + time-domain sim. Directly on-domain for the parasitics agent. Local PDF: S031__estimation_of_smps_conducted_emission_cispr.pdf in knowledge/raw_sources/parasitics/.
Use_caution: Open-access CC-BY: attribution required, summaries fine. Cite the DOI.
